headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Quest Diagnostics, DaVita, Option Care Health and Addus HomeCare
summary: DGX, DVA, OPCH and ADUS gain attention as telehealth, AI adoption and aging population drive growth in home healthcare services.

headline: Helio Genomics to Make HelioLiver™ Cancer Test Accessible to Quest Diagnostics' Providers
summary: Helio Genomics, an AI-powered TechBio company focused on early cancer detection, today announced an agreement with Quest Diagnostics, a leading provider of diagnostic information services, to make HelioLiver™, Helio Genomics' innovative blood-based early detection test for Hepatocellular Carcinoma (HCC), widely available to physicians and patients through Quest's extensive U.S. network. headline: 1 Healthcare Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Avoid
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, and their momentum is only rising as the industry has posted a 3.6% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 2.3 percentage points.

headline: Elanco Animal Health (ELAN) Surges 7.6%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Elanco Animal Health (ELAN) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
